Patch Set 2:

SDNC is using readiness-check:2.0.2 which is not compatible with the version of k8s deployed on gating (1.8.x) so it cannot be tested for now.
another job deployer is in test (with k8s 1.12.3) but it has failed for an internal reason...

oom_redeploy

Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

I was able to confirm this works in my windriver oom environment.
